title: genista pilosa subsp. pilosa
intro: Genista pilosa subsp. pilosa, also known as hairy broom or hairy broom genista, is a perennial legume native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Genista pilosa subsp. pilosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
